---
name: Compliant implementation registration
about: Request listing in the public registry of SecureFusion-compliant implementations
title: '[registry] '
labels: registry
---

**Organisation name**
Legal name of the organisation operating the implementation.

**Spec version implemented**
e.g. SF1, SF1 v1.0

**XRPL anchor account address**
The r-prefixed XRPL classic address from which your SecureFusion anchors will be sent.

**Application Ed25519 public key**
64-character lowercase hex of the 32-byte raw Ed25519 public key used to sign `SF1.sig` memos.

**Conformance evidence**
- [ ] All published conformance test vectors pass against my implementation.
- [ ] My implementation has been independently audited (optional — describe below).

**Audit details (optional)**
If audited, name the auditor, audit date, and link to the public report if available.

**Contact**
A monitored email address for security disclosures and standard updates.

**Additional notes**
Anything else relevant — supported event types, channel counts, regional scope, etc.
